name: Great Old One Spells
description: The magic of your patron ensures you always have certain spells ready; when you reach a Warlock level specified in the Great Old One Spells table, you thereafter always have the listed spells prepared. Table: Warlock Level 3 – Detect Thoughts, Dissonant Whispers, Phantasmal Force, Tasha's Hideous Laughter; Warlock Level 5 – Clairvoyance, Hunger of Hadar; Warlock Level 7 – Confusion, Summon Aberration; Warlock Level 9 – Modify Memory, Telekinesis.
